instruction:
\( \int{\frac{\ln \cos x}{{\cos}^{2}x}dx} \)

Options:
A. (\\tan x)\\ln \\cos x + \\tan x + x - C
B. (\tan x)\ln \cos x - \tan x + x + C
C. (\\tan x)\\ln \\cos x - \\tan x - x + C
D. (\\tan x)\\ln \\cos x + \\tan x + x + C
E. (\cot x)\ln \cos x - \cot x - x + C
F. (\\tan x)\\ln \\cos x + \\tan x - x + C
G. (\\tan x)\\ln \\cos x + \\cot x + x + C
H. (\cot x)\ln \cos x - \tan x - x + C
I. (\\cot x)\\ln \\cos x + \\tan x + x + C
J. (\\tan x)\\ln \\cos x + \\cot x - x + C
